items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you write many e-mails every day?
• Do you read the newspaper at night?
• Do you go to church with your family on weekends?
• Do you understand when I read in English?
• 1- Do you like to write letters to your friends? / relatives / parents

items.text: Do you write many e-mails every day?
Do you read the newspaper at night?
Do you go to church with your family on weekends?

items.answer: Do you understand when I read in English?
1- Do you like to write letters to your friends? / relatives / parents

items.text: 10- What time do you get up every day? / go to bed / study
